title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Medical Officer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
